chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1802 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 25.11.2016. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Soomro, Advocate for respondents No.4&5. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w SIP Nisar Ahmed Mughal Additional SHO Shahdadpur. = Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Bhutto, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Ahmed Khan Pathan, Advocate for petitioner, who is reported to be unwell today. Today, respondents No.4 & 5-Jai Parkash and Chandar are present in Court alongwith their Counsel Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Soomro, who submits that the said respondents have not extended any threats to the petitioner. Conversely, it is the petitioner who owes money to the said respondents. The learned A.A.G submits that since he has not received copy of the present petition, therefore, he is unable to file the comments. However, Additional SHO Nisar Ahmed of P.S Shahdadpur is present and has undertaken that police officials will discharge their functions strictly in accordance with law without siding with any of the parties. This petition is disposed of with the above observation and with directions that respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioner and police officials will act strictly in accordance with law without siding with any of the parties. However, it is clarified that if the private respondents have any genuine grievance against the petitioner, the same shall only be redressed through due process of law and not otherwise. JUDGE Shahid
